entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset with a value of 917,349 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:Assets is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:AssetsNoncurrent with a value of 1,986,899 in the extension taxonomy role 000020 - Statement - BALANCE SHEETS, but us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:AssetsNoncurrent in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset fact are:
Period :2025-03-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - nvec-20260331_10k.htm 1925

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesNoncurrent with a value of 26,304,623 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:Assets is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:AssetsNoncurrent with a value of 1,986,899 in the extension taxonomy role 000020 - Statement - BALANCE SHEETS, but us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesNoncurrent is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:AssetsNoncurrent in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. property.name: label
property.value: Marketable securities, long-term (amortized cost of $23,726,027 as of March 31, 2026, and $26,353,692 as of March 31, 2025)

entry.message:

entry.message:
